title: Ferri 2015 ecological emotional looming sounds
citation: Ferri, F., Costantini, M., Tajadura-Jimenez, A., Valjamae, A., & Vastano, R. (2015). Emotion-inducing approaching sounds shape the boundaries of multisensory peripersonal space. Neuropsychologia, 70, 468-475.
notes: Ecological-sound variant. Current GUI can represent valence-labeled sound conditions but cannot bundle the original ecological audio assets.

provenance.source: UCL Discovery abstract reports negative, positive, and neutral ecological sounds in Experiment 2.
The original ecological recordings are not redistributed; labels are placeholders for user-supplied audio.
